discover.title: Divoom LAN devices
discover.description: Devices bound to the same public IP as your Home Assistant instance.

cloud.title: Divoom cloud sign-in
cloud.description: Used only to fetch the per-device DeviceToken. Credentials are not stored.

token.title: Enter DeviceToken
token.description: Set up {name} at {ip}. Paste the DeviceToken from the Divoom app or a traffic capture.

error.discovery_failed: Cloud LAN discovery failed. Try manual setup.
error.no_devices_found: No Divoom devices found on this LAN.
